sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عِنْدَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi naše lične podatke prilikom korištenja interneta.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal information when using the internet.

sentences.arabic: لَا تُشَارِكْ كَلِمَةَ السِّرِّ الْخَاصَّةَ بِكَ مَعَ أَيِّ شَخْصٍ غَرِيبٍ.
sentences.translation: Ne dijeli svoju lozinku ni sa jednom nepoznatom osobom.
sentences.translationEn: Do not share your private password with any stranger.

sentences.arabic: الْخُصُوصِيَّةُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ أَمْرٌ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلْأَمَانِ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعِ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Digitalna privatnost je neophodna stvar za sigurnost u modernom društvu.
sentences.translationEn: Digital privacy is essential for safety in modern society.
